languages.title: Kajin
languages.subtitle: Kālet kajin eo rej kōjerbale ilo app eo.
languages.noResults: Ejelok kajin ko rej errā ippān pukōt eo am.

phone.label: Nōmba in talboon
phone.searchCountry: Pukot aelõñ, code, ak dial prefix
phone.noCountries: Ejelok ailiñ ko rej errā ippān pukōt eo am.
phone.tooLong: Nōmba in talboon in elap an aitok.
phone.invalid: Likūt juon nōm̧ba in talboon eo ejimwe ñan aelōñ eo kwar kālete.
phone.valid: Nōmba in talboon eo ejimwe an ailiñ ko jet

auth.onboardingTagline: Juon ri kejbarok ñan ien ko ikōtaan “Ij emman” im “Ij aikuj jibañ.”
auth.createSubtitle: Kālet juon wewein deloñ ñan kejbãrok pija in kejbãrok eo am.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Kōm kar jab maroñ in kadedelok am sign-in. Lale koneek eo am im bar kajeoñ.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Kōjerbal juon iien kōkōm̧anm̧anļo̧k ilo jikin eo. Native Google Sign-In ej jerbal ilo juon development build.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Kobaik kiõ ak wōnmanlok im kobaiktok tokelik.
auth.northStarBody: VL01 wearable emaron kōmman bwe en wor safety flow ko ilo am tap im press gesture ko reaitok.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Ripālele eo am ilo map eo im ilo call ko.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear emaron jibañ ilo home mode, guardian mode, emergency mode, excuse calls, im voice support.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Kar kōjerbale ñan map eo, jikin ko rekauwōtata, jikin ko rejimwe, im SOS context.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving ej kajitõk kin jikin eo bwe ri lale ro ren maroñ melele ia eo emaroñ aikuj jibañ ie. Kwomaroñ ukōte tokelik ilo Settings.
permissions.notificationsTitle: Naan in kakkōl ko kin kejbãrok
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Kōjjelā ko rej jibañ check-in ko im ien ko rebin.
permissions.notificationsBody: Jej kōjerbal wōt kōjjelā ko ñan kōjjeļā ko kōn kōjparok, kōkāāl ko ilo jorrāān, im kakeememej ko kwoj kōtlok.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: Jikin eo ej kejbãrok bwe en jimwe
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ej kōjerbal jikin eo am ñan mep in kejbãrok, jikin ko rebin, kwalok ilo mõkaj, im SOS context. Kwomaroñ ukōte tokelik ilo Settings.
permissions.notificationsRationaleTitle: Naan in kakkōl ko rej aikuj kōjjeļā ko
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ej jilkintok nan in kakememej ko ñan check-in, melele ko kin ien ko rebin, im melele ko kin kejbãrok eo kwoj kōmmane. Jejjab kōjerbal kōjjelā ko ñan ad ko.
permissions.microphoneRationaleTitle: Maikrophone ej kōmman bwe en maroñ in call ko ñan kejbãrok
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ej kajerbal microphone eo am wōt ñe kwoj jino juon AI call ñan ro mōttam ak safety call.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleTitle: Bluetooth ej kobaik wearable eo am
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ej kōjerbal Bluetooth ñan koba ippān NorthStar jewelry, riiti jekjek in koneek eo, im kōmman an safety flow ko jen wearable eo.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ej kōjerbal camera eo wot ñe kwoj kōnaan bōk juon pija in profile ak kwalok juon pija in kejbãrok.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving ej kōjparok flow in jen Settings im dashboard eo.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Kālet ainikien eo m̧ōttam̧ eo em̧m̧an tata n̄an ron̄jake.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Lale eo edik ñan kejbãrok raan otemjej.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: Kwalok melele ko ñan armij ro kwoj liki ir.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Lalem tap ko remaroñ wōnmanlok ñan SOS im guardian alerts.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Kōmman juon un eo emman ñan am etal jen juon jikin eo ejjab emman.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Jino juon call in mōttam ilo ien eo emol ñe kwoj aikuj jibañ.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Kajeoñ wāween ko ñan kōjparok ilo juon demo eo edik an kajoor.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Kōjparok jewelry eo iturin ilo ien eo kwoj scan.
jewelry.noDevices: Ejelok NorthStar device ko rej bed iturin.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth scanning ear jab maroñ jinoe. Jouj im bar kajeoñ.
jewelry.scanFailed: Kōm kar jab maroñ loe jewelry ko iturin. Lale Bluetooth, kōjparok NorthStar epaak, innem bar kajeoñ.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth scanning ear jab maroñ jinoe. Lale Bluetooth access im bar kajeoñ.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Nearby-device access ej bōjrak. Kōtlok bwe Bluetooth en deloñ ilo Settings, innem bar kajeoñ.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar ear bōk ien ñan an maroñ in kone. Kōmman bwe en epaaklok im bar kajeoñ.
jewelry.connectFailed: Jejjab maroñ in kone ñan NorthStar. Lale elañe emōj an charge im epaak, innem bar kajeoñ.
jewelry.emptyTitle: Ejelok kein jerbal ko iturin kiiō
jewelry.emptyMessage: Kōmman bwe NorthStar en charge im epaak ñan phone in, innem bar scan.
jewelry.searchingMessage: Ij pukot NorthStar device ko iturin...

home.subtitle: Safety companion dashboard
home.readyBody: Ainikien, map, jewelry, im guardian rej juon wōt tap ettol.
home.northStarDevice: NorthStar kein jerbal kapeel in raan kein

map.title: Map in kejbãrok
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go preview; Mapbox ej kwalok ilo juon development build.
map.updateFailed: Jejjab maroñ in kōkāāl jikin eo am. Jouj im bar kajeoñ.
map.notRequested: Ear jab kajjitōk ñan bōk jikin. Kwomaroñ kōmmane tokelik jen Settings.
map.permissionOff: Ej bōjrak an maroñ in bōk jikin. Kōmman bwe en jerbal ilo Settings ñan an maroñ in kōmman bwe en wor safety map eo ion yuk.
map.timeout: Jikin eo kwoj bed ie ej bōk ien jen kar kōtmene kake. Etal ñan juon jikin eo ewōr juon signal ealikar im bar kajeoñ.
map.savedEmptyTitle: Ejelok jikin ko emōj kōjparoki kiiō
map.savedEmptyMessage: Jikin ko rejimwe kwoj kejbãrok renaj walok ijin ñan an maroñ in mõkaj am maroñ in bōk.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Kōppeļaak ilo jimwe ñan rikōmman ainikien eo am...

messagesWaiting.other: %{count} ennaan ko rej kōttar in jilkintok

safetyCall.typePlaceholder: Taip elañe ej bin am konono
safetyCall.emptyTitle: Bwebwenato eo am ej jino ijin
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Jino call eo ak type juon ennaan ñe kwoj pojak.

history.clearMessage: Menin ej jolok AI ennaan ko jen device in.
history.cannotUndo: Men in ejjab maroñ in bar kōmmane.
history.title: Bwebwenato in bwebwenato
history.subtitle: AI ennaan ko an ro mōttam kar kōjparoki ilo device in.
history.empty: Ejelok bwebwenato ko kar kejbãrok kiõ.
history.emptyMessage: AI bwebwenato ko am renaj walok ijin elikin am kar call moktata.
history.loadFailed: Kōm kar jab maroñ in bōktok bwebwenato in bwebwenato eo. Jouj im bar kajeoñ.
history.clearFailed: Kōm kar jab maroñ in karreoik bwebwenato in bwebwenato eo. Jouj im bar kajeoñ.
history.deleteFailed: Kōm kar jab maroñ in jolok bwebwenato eo. Jouj im bar kajeoñ.

voices.title: Ainikien call in kejbãrok eo ao
voices.subtitle: Kālet ainikien eo ej mōñā eo ej emman am roñjake.
voices.selectionFailedMessage: Jouj im bar kajeoñ in kālet ainikien eo.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Voice sample in ear jab maroñ in al. Jouj im bar kajeoñ.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Kōjerbal uwaak ko an ro mōttam ñe network eo ak Hume credentials rejjab maroñ in jerbal.
settings.privacyBody: Kōtlok ak jolok melele ko ilo device in.
settings.deleteAll: Jolok aolep melele ko ilo jikin eo
settings.exportFailedMessage: Ejjab maroñ in jilkinlok melele ko am kiõ.
settings.deleteConfirmTitle: Jolok aolep melele ko ilo jikin eo?
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Menin ej jolok profile eo am, setting ko, emergency call ko, bwebwenato in bwebwenato ko, permission reminder ko, im local auth session jen device in.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Ejjab maroñ in jolok melele ko ilo jikin eo kiõ.
settings.linkFailed: Ejjab maroñ in kōpeļļo k link eo

sections.companionSubtitle: Ainikien im men ko rejjab online
sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar, ri-lale ro, im ri-kōmmanwa ro ilo ien jorrāān

settings.updateFailedMessage: Kōm kar jab maroñ in kōjparok kōttōpar eo. Jouj im bar kajeoñ.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Session eo am ej jerbal wōt. Jouj im bar kajeoñ.

contacts.title: Rikōnono ro ilo ien jorrāān
contacts.subtitle: Armej ro retiljek rej bed ilo ien ko rej etal ñan kejbãrok.
contacts.addTitle: Kobaik juon kōtaan ilo ien jorrāān
contacts.name: Etan
contacts.empty: Ejelok call in emergency kar kobaiktok kiõ.
contacts.emptyTitle: Ejelok armij in kepaak ilo ien jorrāān kiiō
contacts.emptyMessage: Kobaik juon eo kwoj liki bwe ren pojak ñe juon jikin kejbãrok ej aikuji ir.
contacts.removeMessage: Armej in ejamin bar walok ilo emergency flow eo am.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Kōm kar jab maroñ in kōjparok kōtaan in. Lale melele ko im bar kajeoñ.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Kōm kar jab maroñ in jolok kōtaan in. Jouj im bar kajeoñ.

device.title: Kōjparok kein jerbal ko
device.subtitle: Lale NorthStar device eo am.
device.none: Ejelok kein jerbal ko rej kone

friends.title: Ro mōttam
friends.subtitle: Ri lale ro, kajjitōk ko, im pija in jorrāān.
friends.emptyTitle: Jikin kōjparok eo am ejjelok armij ie
friends.emptyMessage: Ro mōttam im ro rej lale er renaj walok ijin ñe rej kobaiktok.

emergency.title: Imjerjenji SOS
emergency.subtitle: Kōmman wōt ñe kwoj aikuj jibañ ilo ien eo wot.
emergency.body: Menin enaj kōjjelāik wāween am kōjparok im kōpooj rikōnono ro ilo jorrāān.
emergency.notificationBody: Emergency flow eo am emoj an pojak.
emergency.addContact: Kobaik juon contact in emergency ilo Settings.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Stub in kwalok jikin ko emoj an pojak. Kobaik backend share endpoint eo ñan jilkinlok live link ko.

quickShare.title: Mōkaj in kwalok
quickShare.subtitle: Location share flow emoj an pojak.

capybearTap.title: Capybear kein kajo
capybearTap.subtitle: Double-tap NorthStar eo am ñan jolok juon safety orange.
capybearTap.body: Gesture route ej pojak ñan BLE event wiring.

errors.voiceOffline: Kwoj einwot jab online. Enaj jilkintok ennan eo am ñe kwoj bar kone.
errors.voiceQueued: Emoj kōjparok ennaan eo. Enaj jilkintok ñe voice companion eo ej bar kobalok.
errors.voiceRetrying: Ij kajeoñ in bar jilkintok ennan eo am...
errors.voiceConnecting: Kōppeļaak ilo jimwe ñan rikōmman ainikien eo am...
errors.microphone: Ej aikuj in wōr microphone ñan call ko. Kwomaroñ kōmmane ilo Settings, ak type juon message ilo jikin eo.
errors.billing: Online voice companion eo ejjab maroñ in jerbal. Kwomaroñ wōnmanlok wōt ippān eo ejjab online.
errors.authentication: Rikōmman ainikien eo ear jab maroñ in kamool ien in. Bar deloñ ak kajerbal offline companion eo ñan kiõ.
errors.timeout: Rikōnono eo ear bōk ien ñan an uwaak. Lale koneek eo am im bar kajeoñ.
errors.network: Kōm kar jab maroñ in tōpar rikōnono eo. Lale koneek eo am, innem bar kajeoñ ak wōnmanlok ilo am jab online.
errors.genericVoice: Juon men ear bōbrae ainikien eo. Bar kajeoñ, ak wōnmanlok wōt ippān eo ejjab online.

notifications.channelName: Naan in kakkōl ko kin kejbãrok

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving ej aikuj in maroñ in bōk microphone ñan kejbãrok im AI call ko an ro mōttan.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving ej kōjerbal jikin eo am ñan mep in kejbãrok eo im kein kejbãrok ko iturin.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving ej kōjerbal Bluetooth ñan kōppeļaak ñan NorthStar jewelry in kōjparok eo am.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Jekjek in etal ñan sign-in ejjab maroñ jerbal ilo build in.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Demo mode ej kōjerbal local fake data wōt. Connected services rejjab authenticated, im session in enaaj bar jino ñe app eo ej bar load.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Verification code eo ejjab jimwe ak emōj an expired. Kajjitōk code eo ekāāl im bar kajjioñ.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Elōñ an kar kajjioñ sign-in. Kottar jidik, innem bar kajjioñ.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Sign-in verification eo eaitokļọk. Etale connection eo am im bar kajjioñ.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Kōmijjab maroñ tōpar sign-in service eo. Etale connection eo am im bar kajjioñ.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Session eo am emōj an expired. Bar sign in.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Safety map eo ejjab maroñ load. Etale connection eo am im bar kajjioñ.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Live location ejjab bellọk. Ej kwalok location eo am āliktata kar save ilo %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Kōmijjab maroñ share location eo am. Etale location access im bar kajjioñ.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Ijin ej location eo aō kar record ilo %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Ijin ej location eo aō āliktata kar save im record ilo %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Bluetooth access ej off. Kōjerbale ilo Settings, innem bar kajjioñ.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth ej off. Kōjerbale, innem bar kajjioñ.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Bluetooth pairing ejjab bellọk ilo device ak build in.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Kōmijjab maroñ lo NorthStar. Kōjparok bwe en pād turim, etale Bluetooth, im bar kajjioñ.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Ejelọk NorthStar device iturin kar loe. Kōjparok bwe en pād turim im bar scan.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Kōmijjab maroñ connect ñan NorthStar. Kōjparok bwe en charged im pād turim, innem bar kajjioñ.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Kōmijjab maroñ save location in. Bar kajjioñ.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Phone dialer eo emōj an bellọk; ejjab confirmed call eo.
releaseCritical.sosCancelled: Emōj cancel; ejelọk call kar kōmmani.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Ejelọk emergency contact kar bellọk; ejelọk call kar kōmmani.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Phone dialer eo ejjab maroñ bellọk; ejelọk call kar kōmmani.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Kajjioñ SOS eo āliktata ejjab maroñ confirmed.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Voice companion eo ejjab bellọk kiiō. Bar kajjioñ tokālik ak wōnmaanlok ippān offline companion eo.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.
